# Transcrição: 06-Make Passive Income on the Side 

- **Fonte:** 06-Make Passive Income on the Side 
- **Duração:** 01:21

## [00:00 - 01:21]

It's finally here, the FATC affiliate program that has been pretty much years in the making is officially live. So how this works is you will get an opportunity to earn passive income on the side by referring people that then sign up to FATC. As you probably know, FATC is a monthly membership, so you get 30% of the membership fee and that is recurring for as long as they stay a member. This is a great opportunity for those of you that have leads coming through that are not quite ready to pay the prices that you want. Maybe they want to DIY things a little bit, or you have peers in the industry that are looking for a place to get support on their funnels and client campaigns, a place to upskill and learn things about Facebook advertising, and then a place to get connected with paid gigs. So all you have to do is pretty much read the information below. You're going to click the link and then it's going to ask you a bunch of your details that's going to generate your affiliate link. And then from there, anytime you share it out, anyone that signs up that has come through that will then be credited back to you. So thanks again for being part of it guys and keep watching the space for any updates or competitions that we have for our affiliates. Welcome to the family.
